creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Thanks, imported.  My changes: 

=== 
diff -ru xfrisk/Makefile xfrisk.new/Makefile 
--- xfrisk/Makefile	Sun Apr 20 15:18:39 1997 
+++ xfrisk.new/Makefile	Tue Jun  3 19:29:19 1997 
@@ -12,7 +12,9 @@ 
MASTER_SITES=   $(MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB) 
MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	games/multiplayer/ 

-MAINTAINER=	Matthew Hunt <mph@pobox.com> 
+MAINTAINER=	mph@pobox.com 
+ 
+NO_CDROM=	Possible trademark infringement 

USE_IMAKE=	yes 
NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES=	yes 
=== 

There is no "rule" for MAINTAINER but I am afraid it might break 
some script somewhere. ;)
